other_observers: Tom Wilberding; several others including Brandon Percival and Van Manen (original observer?)
description: Basically a black woodpecker with flashing white in wings and white rump shown while in flight. White iris, red cap (black and red in female) and white face all distinctive. Black bib with black streaking down the white chest, belly and vents.Behaviors: Flew to and from dead Ponderosa Pine snag with occasional pecking at the bark. Visited and entered a nest hole from which I could hear young begging.Call: loud yackingPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Tom Wilberding, Bill Kaempfer, Bill Kaempfer
